description_long: This chaise features a minimalist, rectangular design with a gently rounded edge profile and a smooth, continuous seat surface. The upholstery is a light gray fabric, tightly fitted and subtly stitched, giving it a modern and clean appearance. The seat is supported by four slender, black metal legs that are straight and slightly splayed for stability. The frame appears to be constructed from a rigid material, possibly wood or metal, and is fully upholstered along the sides and top. There are no visible armrests or backrest, emphasizing its bench-like, open form. The overall look is contemporary and functional, suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern, rectangular chaise with light gray fabric upholstery and four slender black metal legs, featuring a minimalist, backless design.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the rounded edge of the seat and two black metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the chaise, the smooth seat surface, and all four legs.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, mirroring view 0 with the same rounded edge and two visible legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the chaise's length and leg arrangement.
attribute_backrest_design: There is no backrest present; the chaise has a flat, open seating surface with no raised or segmented back support.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, slender, and made of black metal, with a simple, modern finish and no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid light gray fabric with subtle stitched lines, giving it a smooth and uniform appearance.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, continuous cushion integrated into the seat, with no separate or loose cushions visible.
